
---
title: "Bonus Slides Software Containers"
author: "Samuel Pawel, Peter Degen, Fabio Molo, Gorka Fraga González"
date-format: long
preview-links: true
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      #title-slide .title {
        font-size: 1.8em;
        color: #29487d;
      }
      </style>
format:
  revealjs:
    menu: true
    pdf: true
    code-line-numbers: false
    smaller: true
    fig-align: left
    logo: "img/uzh_logo_d_pos_web_assoc.jpg"
    embed-resources: true
    progress: true
    slide-number: true
    footer: "Center for Reproducible Science and Research Synthesis | [Home](../../index.qmd)"
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-size: contain
      data-background-position: bottom
      data-background-opacity: "0.8"
bibliography: references.bib
---


## Putting it all together

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="55%"}
![Modified from @Peikert2021](img/workflow-quarto.png)
:::

:::: {.column width="45%"}
::: fragment
Terminal

``` {.bash style="font-size:0.85em"}
# clone git repository
git clone git@gitlab.uzh.ch:crsuzh/zurich-names.git

# enter project repository
cd zurich-names

# run automated analyses inside Docker
make docker-report
```

→ `report.html`

[https://gitlab.uzh.ch/crsuzh/zurich-names](https://gitlab.uzh.ch/crsuzh/zurich-names){style="font-size:0.65em"}
:::
::::
::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------
